Abia State NMA suspends planned strike as kidnapped orthopaedic surgeon, Dr. Uche Bonaventure Aguocha, regains freedom after nine days in captivity.

Read More: https://punchng.com/abia-doctors-suspend-planned-strike-as-kidnapped-surgeon-regains-freedom/

articles.title: TMC dissolves West Bengal units, launches overhaul after poll drubbing
articles.excerpt: The Trinamool Congress has dissolved all its party committees in West Bengal. This move follows their defeat in the state assembly election. The party will now conduct a thorough review to identify reasons for the loss. New appointments and a restructured org…
